GREEK_ESTHER.form: Greek Esther active form is governed as named Addition sections plus ordinary Esther chapters; do not repair by simple full-source overlay.
GREEK_ESTHER.policy: Treat estherGK.json as the actual active Greek Esther file for this repo. Do not create greekesther.json as a parallel active file without a separate migration decision.

GREEK_DANIEL.form: Greek Daniel active form is governed as extended Daniel in a single book shape, with chapter 3 embedded Prayer/Song material, Susanna as chapter 13, and Bel and the Dragon as chapter 14; do not repair by simple full-source overlay.
GREEK_DANIEL.policy: Treat danielGK.json as the actual active Greek Daniel file for this repo. Do not create greekdaniel.json as a parallel active file without a separate migration decision.

determination.summary: DEUTERO-02 Greek Esther and Greek Daniel are not missing-book problems. The repo already has active Greek addition files under estherGK.json and danielGK.json. Their boundary is form policy and source-shape governance, not source acquisition or same-name file creation.

nextActions.action: Run a bounded source/active-form audit for estherGK.json and danielGK.json if textual repair or adapter work is needed.
Update any readiness audit that still classifies Greek Esther or Greek Daniel as missing solely because greekesther.json or greekdaniel.json is absent.

existingGovernanceSnapshot.note: Existing governance file is the controlling prior decision record; this DEUTERO-02 boundary records the actual active file paths and blocks false missing-file claims.
